content.cn_text: 我谨代表诺斯菲尔德体育中心，向今晚在座的各位表示最热烈的欢迎。
content.en_text: On behalf of Northfiels Sports Complex, I'd like to extend our warmest welcome to all here this evening.

content.cn_text: 我是乔治·戴森，诺斯菲尔德体育中心的创始人。
content.en_text: I'm George Dyson, founder of Northfiels Sports Complex.

content.cn_text: 我今天发表演讲是为了庆祝一个特殊的时刻。
content.en_text: I'm giving this speech today to celebrate a special occasion.

content.cn_text: 我们在整整十年前开始做生意，今天，我们已经发展成为一家拥有相当数量成员的大公司。
content.en_text: We started the business exactly a decade ago, and today, we have developed into a large firm with a sizable group of members.

content.cn_text: 在下周举行的年度商业奖上，我们还被Green Town提名为“最有价值公司”。
content.en_text: We've also been nominated the "Most Valuable Company" by Green Town at the yearly Business Awards which will be held next week.

content.cn_text: 12、作为有经验、有资质的记者，我们邀请你们来体验和见证这一历史性时刻
content.en_text: As experienced and qualified reporters, you are invited here to experience and witness this historical moment

content.cn_text: 和我们一起去诺斯菲尔德体育中心
content.en_text: of Northfield Sports Complex together with us.

content.cn_text: 诺斯菲尔德体育中心位于格林镇大学校园内，是一个现代化的、令人耳目一新的、设备齐全的各种体育设施。
content.en_text: Situated within the campus of Green Town University, Northfield Sports Complex is a modem, refreshing and fully-equipped facility for sports of all kinds.

content.cn_text: 作为对当地社区承诺的一部分，诺斯菲尔德体育中心不仅向学生开放，也向当地居民开放。
content.en_text: As part of its commitment to the local community, Northfield Sports Complex is available not only to school children but also to local residents.

content.cn_text: 酒店设施齐全，包括一个25米长的游泳池、铺设的步行道和慢跑道、设备齐全的健身房、全天候球场、室内乒乓球场、网球场和其他运动场地，以及一个著名的溜冰场。
content.en_text: It offers a wide range of facilities including a 25-metre swimming pool, paved walking and jogging paths, a well-equipped fitness gym,all-weather pitches, indoor courts for table tennis, tennis and other sports, as well as a renowned skating rink.

content.cn_text: 不同年龄段的人都能找到适合自己的运动项目。
content.en_text: Different age groups can all find the right sports to participate in.

content.cn_text: 这就是为什么当地居民喜欢在这里锻炼。
content.en_text: That's why local residents enjoy working out here.

content.cn_text: 因此，这里的本地人比我们国家的大多数人都健康。
content.en_text: As a result, natives here are healthier than most of the people within our nation.

content.cn_text: 整个小镇都为培养了两位世界冠军而感到自豪，他们都曾在我们的溜冰场接受过训练。
content.en_text: The whole town is very proud of having nurtured two world champions, who were once both trained right here in our skating rink.

content.cn_text: 因此，它已成为学习滑冰和娱乐的理想场所。
content.en_text: Thus it has become the ideal venue to leam to skate and have fun.

content.cn_text: 但我最引以为傲的是，这里的溜冰场激起了当地学校里男孩和女孩们滑冰的兴趣。
content.en_text: But what I take pride in most of all is the skating rink that has stirred the interest of boys and girls here in local schools to skate.

content.cn_text: 自从开放以来，越来越多的学生定期来溜冰场。
content.en_text: Since opening, an increasing number of pupils have been paying regular visits to the skating rink.

content.cn_text: 下个月，一间配有教练的新瑜伽教室将为带孩子的母亲开放。他们可以带自己的瑜伽垫，和孩子一起锻炼。
content.en_text: A new yoga classroom with trainers will be open next month for mothers with babies.They can bring their own yoga mat and work out together with their babies.

content.cn_text: 这将是她们获得健康和认识其他妈妈的好方法。
content.en_text: This will be a great way for them to get healthy and meet other moms.

content.cn_text: 在不久的将来，还将有一个全新的健身房向养老金领取者开放。
content.en_text: There will also be a brand new gym open to the pensioners in the near future.

content.cn_text: 就在这个月，一个新的游泳池向所有健身水平的人开放，并为失业者提供特别优惠。
content.en_text: Just this month a new swimming pool is open to all fitness levels with special offers for those without a job.

content.cn_text: 除了感恩节和圣诞节，我们的办公时间是每天早上8点到晚上9点。我们打算在明年扩大我们的业务。
content.en_text: Our complex is open daily from 8 am to 9 pm except on Thanksgiving and Christmas. We intend to extend our business in the coming year.

content.cn_text: 从有氧运动器材到运动恢复和伤害预防设备等一系列设备将被出售。
content.en_text: A list of equipment will be put up for sale ranging from exercising equipment like cardio machines to sports recovery and injury prevention facilities.

content.cn_text: 在我们的复杂，我们尽最大努力避免任何形式的伤害。
content.en_text: Within our complex, we try our best to avoid injuries of any kind.

content.cn_text: 我们训练知识渊博的员工来指导我们的客户正确的锻炼方案。
content.en_text: We train knowledgeable staff to guide our clients through correct workout regimens.

content.cn_text: 问16:欢迎有意进一步确保健身安全的人士申请成为本会常务委员会委员。
content.en_text: For those who want to further ensure workout safety, they are welcome to apply to be a member of our standing committee.

content.cn_text: 他们负责修订安全指南并监督其执行。
content.en_text: They are responsible for revising the safety guidelines and supervising its enforcement.

content.cn_text: 现在我想介绍一些我们在诺斯菲尔德体育中心最受欢迎的体育设施。
content.en_text: Now I would like to introduce some of our most popular sports facilities here at Northfield Sport Complex.

content.cn_text: 我们25米长的游泳池是整个建筑群的中心。
content.en_text: Our 25-metre swimming pool is the centrepiece of the complex.

content.cn_text: 结合了现代，明亮和通风的环境和完全最新的改变设施，游泳池是学习如何游泳，提高技术，当然，参加学校比赛的绝佳场所。
content.en_text: Combining modem, bright and airy surroundings with fully up-to-date changing facilities, the pool is excellent for learning how to swim, improving techniques and, of course, competing in school competitions.

content.cn_text: 也可以预订私人活动，包括泳池派对，那里有救生员。
content.en_text: It is also bookable for private functions,including pool parties, where lifeguards are available.

content.cn_text: 接下来，我们有全镇唯一的攀岩墙。
content.en_text: Next, we have the only climbing wall throughout the whole town.

content.cn_text: 许多人认为攀岩是一种极限运动，对参与者来说风险很大。
content.en_text: Many would see rock climbing as a type of extreme sport, exposing great risk to those who participate.

content.cn_text: 但实际上，在教练的正确指导和密切监督下，它是年轻人增加灵活性和增强肌肉的完美运动。
content.en_text: But actually, under proper guidance and with close supervision by the coach here, it is a perfect sport for the youth to increase their flexibility and strengthen their muscles.

content.cn_text: 我不得不再次提到我们的溜冰场。
content.en_text: I have to mention our skating rink once again.

content.cn_text: 作为我们最受欢迎的设施，它在我们最近发布的一个电视广告中占据了显著位置。
content.en_text: As our most popular facility, it has been prominently featured in a TV commercial we've released recently.

content.cn_text: 全国没有比我们的溜冰场更大的了。
content.en_text: There is no other skating rink larger than ours within the whole nation.

content.cn_text: 此外，我们最先进的健身房是一个鼓舞人心的地方，在轻松友好的环境中训练和保持健康。
content.en_text: Also, our state-of-the-art gym is an inspiring place to train and keep fit in relaxed and friendly surroundings.

content.cn_text: 泰诺健的设备使我们的客户能够衡量他们的表现。
content.en_text: The Technogym equipment enables our clients to measure their performance.

content.cn_text: 如果你预约一个一对一的教练，他或她可能会建议一个未来的训练计划，帮助你更系统地训练
content.en_text: If you book a one-on-one trainer, he or she might suggest a future training plan and help you train more systematically

groups.desc:
Questions 11-16
Choose the correct letter, A, B or C.

items.title: What is the purpose of the talk?

options.title: C
options.content: to celebrate the award it received recently

items.analysis: 演讲者明确表示他正在庆祝一个特殊场合，并随后解释说公司成立已有十年。这直接对应了选项B"纪念10周年"。演讲的主要目的是庆祝公司成立十周年这一里程碑事件，而不是欢迎新成员或庆祝近期获得的奖项。

items.title: What's the audience of this speech?
items.analysis: 这道题的正确答案是A. journalists（记者），因为原文中明确提到演讲者是在对"experienced and qualified reporters"（有经验且合格的记者）讲话。记者属于journalists的范畴，这直接表明了演讲的听众身份。此外，"you are invited here"（你们被邀请到这里）进一步确认了这些记者就是演讲的直接听众。

items.title: Why is the speaker most proud of the skating rink?

options.title: A
options.content: Because two world champions have been trained there.

options.title: B
options.content: Because people in this area are fitter than the rest of the country.

options.title: C
options.content: Because they have encouraged local school children to participate more in sports.

items.analysis: 演讲者明确表示他最自豪的是滑冰场激发了当地学校学生的兴趣。这直接对应了选项C，即滑冰场鼓励了当地学校儿童更多地参与体育活动。演讲者强调了学生兴趣的增长和访问人数的增加，这表明滑冰场对促进学生参与体育活动起到了积极作用。

items.title: The complex has recently opened a new venue for
items.analysis: 这道题的正确答案是A（the unemployed），因为原文中明确提到"Just this month"（就在本月）一个新的游泳池开放，并且为"those without a job"（没有工作的人）提供特别优惠。"without a job"是"unemployed"的同义表达，而且"Just this month"表明这是最近开放的设施，符合题目中"recently"的要求。

items.title: What does the complex plan to do next year?
items.analysis: 这道题的正确答案是C（sell fitness equipment），因为原文中明确提到"A list of equipment will be put up for sale"（一系列设备将被挂牌出售）。这里的"put up for sale"就是"sell"的同义表达。而且，文中还具体列举了将要出售的设备类型，包括运动器械和各种设施，这些都属于健身器材的范畴。因此，选项C最准确地概括了体育中心明年的计划。

items.title: What does the complex encourage people to do?
items.analysis: 文中明确表示"welcome to apply to be a member of our standing committee"，这表明体育中心鼓励人们加入委员会。"welcome to"是一种鼓励和邀请的表达方式，与题目中的"encourage"相对应。此外，文中提到委员会负责修订安全指南和监督执行，进一步强调了加入委员会的重要性。因此，选项B "be on the committee"是最符合原文意思的答案。

groups.desc:
Questions 17-20
Choose FOUR answers from the box and write the correct letter, A-G, next to
Questions 17-20.

list.title: B
list.content: It is featured in a TV drama.

list.title: C
list.content: It is beneficial for young people.

list.title: D
list.content: It is only available for women sometimes.

list.title: E
list.content: It is the largest in the country.

list.title: F
list.content: It can be booked for parties.

list.title: G
list.content: It is a place to hold courses for school children.

items.title: Swimming pool
items.analysis: 文中明确提到游泳池可以预订用于私人活动，特别提到了"pool parties"（泳池派对）。这直接对应了选项F"It can be booked for parties"。此外，提到有救生员在场，进一步强调了这是一种可预订的服务。因此，F是最符合原文内容的正确答案。

items.title: Climbing wall
items.analysis: 文中明确指出攀岩是"一项完美的运动，可以增加年轻人的灵活性并增强他们的肌肉"。这直接表明攀岩对年轻人是有益的，因此选项C "It is beneficial for young people"是正确答案。此外，文中强调了在适当指导和监督下进行攀岩的重要性，这进一步说明了这项运动对年轻人的益处。

items.title: Skating rink
items.analysis: 文中明确指出"There is no other skating rink larger than ours within the whole nation"，这直接表明了他们的滑冰场是全国最大的。这个陈述与选项E "It is the largest in the country" 完全吻合，因此E是正确答案。

items.title: Gym
items.analysis: 文中明确提到了可以预约一对一教练（"book a one-on-one trainer"），这与选项A "A one-on-one coach is bookable" 直接对应。健身房提供一对一教练服务，并且这项服务是可以预约的，因此A选项是正确答案。
